trade.summary: Robust bilateral trade. Canada exports aircraft, aerospace parts, crude oil, and agricultural goods to Francia. Francia exports aircraft engines, luxury goods, pharmaceuticals, wine, and machinery to Canada. Airbus and Bombardier/CAE ties are notable.

diplomatic.summary: Exceptionally close ties rooted in the French-Canadian heritage. Quebec's relationship with Francia is distinctive and culturally rich. Both are G7 members, NATO allies, Francophonie partners. Francia-Canada cooperation on climate, Ucraina support, and multilateral affairs is strong.

military.summary: NATO allies with extensive defense cooperation. Joint operations in Mali, Libia, and other theaters. Intelligence sharing through allied frameworks. Significant interoperability and joint exercises.

financial.summary: Substantial bilateral investment. French companies (TotalEnergies, Renault, Michelin, AXA) have major Canadian operations. Canadian banks and pension funds invest extensively in French assets. CETA facilitates investment flows.

energy.summary: Francia is a potential Canadian LNG importer. TotalEnergies has Canadian oil sands investments. Growing cooperation on clean hydrogen. French nuclear expertise relevant to Canadian nuclear energy sector.

scientific.summary: Outstanding scientific partnership, deepened by linguistic and cultural ties. Joint research centers exist in Quebec. Collaboration in space (CSA-CNES), marine science, health, and quantum computing. Very active academic exchange.
